mapper.select: select cata_id from catalogo where cata_carpeta = #{carpeta}
mapper.insert:
select case when max(cata_id) is null then '1' else max(cata_id)+1 end id from catalogo
INSERT INTO catalogo( cata_id, cata_nombre, cata_estado, cata_descripcion, cata_carpeta) VALUES (#{cataId}, #{cataNombre}, #{cataEstado}, #{cataDescripcion}, #{cataCarpeta});

select case when max(carp_id) is null then '1' else max(carp_id)+1 end id from carpeta
INSERT INTO carpeta( carp_id, carp_tipo, carp_ruta, carp_propietario) VALUES (#{id}, #{tipo}, #{ruta}, #{propietario})
mapper.select: select count(cata_id)::integer from catalogo where cata_nombre = #{cataNombre}
select count(cata_id)::integer from catalogo where cata_nombre = #{cataNombre} and cata_id!=#{cataId}
